name: Logtail (Better Stack) Logs API
what_it_does: Modern log management platform (part of Better Stack) with REST API for structured log ingestion, SQL-based log querying, and log analytics. Developer-friendly with automatic parsing and structured search.
use_cases: Querying application logs with SQL for automated incident investigation agents
Shipping structured logs from any source via HTTP ingestion API
Building log-based alerting pipelines that trigger on specific log patterns
Correlating log data with uptime incidents from Better Stack Uptime
Exporting log data to data warehouses for compliance archival
not_for: Real User Monitoring and session replay (use LogRocket or FullStory)
best_when: An agent needs to query production logs with SQL-like syntax for incident analysis, or needs structured log ingestion with automatic parsing.
avoid_when: You need full observability stack (logs + metrics + traces) — Logtail is log-focused.

auth.notes: API token from Better Stack dashboard. Bearer token for log queries and management API. Source token (separate) for log ingestion. Each log source has its own ingestion token.

pricing.notes: Usage-based with generous free tier. Pricing scales with log volume and retention period. Part of Better Stack (includes Uptime monitoring). Competitive with Datadog Logs on cost.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; designed for high-throughput ingestion

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documentation covers queries and source management. SQL-based query API enables powerful log analysis. Error responses are JSON with descriptive messages. Webhook delivery for log alerts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Log ingestion is append-only. Query operations are idempotent read operations.
known_agent_gotchas: Separate tokens for log ingestion vs API management — agents need both
Query API uses SQL-like syntax but has Logtail-specific functions and limitations
Log retention varies by plan — agents querying historical data must check plan limits
Better Stack integration allows combining log alerts with uptime incidents

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. GDPR with EU data residency option. TLS enforced. Separate ingestion and management tokens reduce blast radius. No scope granularity beyond token types.
